component.name: Mastodon MCP Server
component.summary: Model Context Protocol server for Mastodon integration

description.p: A comprehensive MCP server providing access to Mastodon social network functionality through the Model Context Protocol, enabling AI assistants and other MCP-compatible tools to interact with Mastodon instances.

ul.li: Status posting, deleting, favouriting, and reblogging
Account management and social graph operations (follow, block, mute)
Full-text search for accounts, statuses, and hashtags
Support for both STDIO and HTTP transports

description.p: Replace fastmcp dependency with bundled stdlib-only MCP implementation.
